tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file at the given path and return it as a string.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file at the given path. Creates the file if it does not exist.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the files and directories at the given path.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return its stdout and stderr.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a glob pattern under the given directory.
